name: Depeche Mode
bio: Depeche Mode built one of the most durable synth-pop catalogs in popular music, with songs that still travel across streaming, sync, and nostalgia listening decades after release.
notable_for: Dark synth-pop crossover, global catalog longevity, and unusually durable live-era recognition.
career_highlight: The band's late-1980s and early-1990s catalog remains commercially active through streaming, playlisting, and recurring media usage.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate assumes strong long-tail streaming around signature singles, recurring sync value, and meaningful creator participation in the songwriting side of the catalog.

ownership.master_owner: Likely split between label-controlled masters and artist royalty participation
ownership.publishing_owner: Publishing appears strongly tied to songwriter-side participation
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No major catalog sale adjustment is assumed here
ownership.notes: A large legacy catalog can generate substantial gross revenue even when master ownership stays label-heavy.
